ios.subtitle: Human Value Blockchain
ios.description:
Open Wallet is a non-custodial crypto wallet, mobile-first blockchain, and human value token — built to implement The Human Constitution.

300 screens covering every dimension of human life: health, education, economy, governance, culture, nature, safety, spirituality, arts, and community.

Key Features:
• Multi-chain wallet: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Cosmos, Open Chain
• 8 swap options: THORChain, 1inch, Jupiter, Osmosis, DEX, Order Book, Atomic Swap, Li.Fi
• 6 OTK value channels: Nurture, Education, Health, Community, Economic, Governance
• One-human-one-vote governance
• Living Ledger — lifelong record of contributions
• Peace Index — measure progress toward world peace
• 10 languages, Simple Mode, offline-first
• Post-quantum cryptography (ML-DSA + Ed25519)
• 100% open source (MIT license)

The Human Constitution: "World peace through better-raised, better-educated, better-supported human beings."

Source: github.com/bpupadhyaya/crypto

ja.name: Open Wallet
ja.subtitle: 人間価値ブロックチェーン

android.shortDescription: Non-custodial crypto wallet implementing The Human Constitution. 300 screens. 8 swap options. 10 languages.
android.fullDescription:
Open Wallet is a non-custodial crypto wallet, mobile-first blockchain, and human value token — built to implement The Human Constitution.

🌍 300 screens covering every dimension of human life
💱 8 swap options across 5 blockchains
🗳️ One-human-one-vote governance
📖 Living Ledger — lifelong contribution record
☮️ Peace Index — measuring world peace
🔐 Post-quantum cryptography
🌐 10 languages, offline-first
📱 100% open source (MIT)

Value Channels:
• nOTK (Nurture) — parenting, caregiving
• eOTK (Education) — teaching, mentoring
• hOTK (Health) — healthcare, wellness
• cOTK (Community) — volunteering, service
• xOTK (Economic) — trade, employment
• gOTK (Governance) — civic participation

"World peace through better-raised, better-educated, better-supported human beings."

Source: github.com/bpupadhyaya/crypto
Website: equalinformation.com
